item.title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts Shares Pinewood Derby Tips
item.description: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts offers practical Pinewood Derby tips, focusing on design, speed, and simple techniques to improve performance.

media:content.media:title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts Shares Pinewood Derby Tips
media:content.media:description: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts offers practical Pinewood Derby tips, focusing on design, speed, and simple techniques to improve performance.

item.title: Starting Your Own Car Dealership
item.description: An overview of how to start a car dealership, covering planning, licensing, inventory, and key steps to build a successful business.

media:content.media:title: Starting Your Own Car Dealership
media:content.media:description: An overview of how to start a car dealership, covering planning, licensing, inventory, and key steps to build a successful business.

item.title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on a Suburban Repair
item.description: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts works on a Suburban, demonstrating expert tips and techniques for vehicle maintenance and repair.

media:content.media:title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on a Suburban Repair
media:content.media:description: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts works on a Suburban, demonstrating expert tips and techniques for vehicle maintenance and repair.

item.title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on a tense test drive
item.description: Authorities respond to an incident involving a car saleswoman during a test drive. No graphic details are shared, focusing on safety and investigation.

media:content.media:title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on a tense test drive
media:content.media:description: Authorities respond to an incident involving a car saleswoman during a test drive. No graphic details are shared, focusing on safety and investigation.

item.title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on the Loan Shark Corvette
item.description: After buying a Corvette, the owner navigates challenges with a loan shark, highlighting the risks of high-interest loans and financial decisions.

media:content.media:title: Rob “Rabbit” Pitts on the Loan Shark Corvette
media:content.media:description: After buying a Corvette, the owner navigates challenges with a loan shark, highlighting the risks of high-interest loans and financial decisions.
